pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take: **Devin, look at me. LOOK AT ME. YOU DRAFTED BOSNIA, and you're about to swallow the bitter pill from Zach's 'Mustard Boy' squad.** In Atlanta, Czechia may not be the powerhouse of yesteryear, but there is more fight in them than you have courage in your lineup decisions. You chose Bosnia, a team that is lost and out of its depth; not even the grit of the 1994 U.S. squad could save them. I'm calling it now: Zach's Czechia is marching through South Africa like it's a Sunday stroll. Now, let's really dive into 'Mustard Boy' Zach versus the reckless 'Ghost Pepper' Devin—Zach's Switzerland has the precision of a fine Swiss watch, ready to dismantle your misstep of Bosnia in Inglewood. This one ain't close; prepare for a showcase of European elegance that you should've seen coming from miles away. If you can't respect the game, then turn in your cleats, Devin. And as for 'Bubba G' Gunner, sitting flat in last place? Frankly, it's embarrassing—it's like watching a fish try to climb a tree. You all better tighten your bootstraps, because if you think crawling through this pool is tough, just wait until you try facing the real heat of the World Cup pitch. Mic-drop: If you can't take the heat, gentlemen, stay out of the World Cup kitchen.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Czechia Poised to Test Devin's South Africa in Atlanta
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy aims for double points amidst his tier 3 gamble.

pundit_takes.headline: Switzerland and Bosnia Clash to Influence Mid-Table Fantasy Standings
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper's hopes pinned on Bosnia, currently in 4th place.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner's Canada Set to Face Qatar in Vancouver Showdown
pundit_takes.subtitle: Bubba G looks for points to close the gap from last place.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's Korea Republic Set to Challenge Mexico in Zapopan
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Backpass Assassin defends his top spot with tactical prowess.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's 24% to win it all but barely ahead of the teenager, Rafe!
Rafe drafted three teams not even in the World Cup — still rank 2!
Devin might want to call in reinforcements, losing 6 points to newbie Rafe!
Sim crashes harder than Gunner after Rafe's teenage chaos agent invasion.
